hooks.command: bash -c 'p=scripts/check-launch-block.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; echo "[google-ads-strategist] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'
hooks.description: Block Chrome navigation to Google Ads campaign creation / edit / delete / billing URLs

hooks.command: bash -c 'p=scripts/check-hypothesis-present.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; echo "[google-ads-strategist] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'
hooks.description: Block writing an iteration spec.md without a sibling hypothesis.md

hooks.command: bash -c 'p=scripts/check-single-variable.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; echo "[google-ads-strategist] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'
hooks.description: Validate that hypothesis.md declares exactly one variable class (or justified multivariate)

hooks.command: bash -c 'p=scripts/check-wait-gate.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; echo "[google-ads-strategist] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'
hooks.description: Post-launch: enforce N-day wait between iteration applies for statistical significance

hooks.command: bash -c 'p=scripts/check-hypothesis-log.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; echo "[google-ads-strategist] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'
hooks.description: Block writing result.md without a corresponding entry in hypothesis-log.md

hooks.command: bash -c 'p=scripts/check-estonian-diacritics.sh; for r in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD" "$PWD/.."; do [ -n "$r" ] && [ -f "$r/$p" ] && exec bash "$r/$p"; done; echo "[google-ads-strategist] hook target not found: $p" >&2; exit 0'
hooks.description: Block writing spec.md with ASCII substitutes for Estonian diacritics (ä, ö, ü, õ, š, ž)
